title: Time Missing - Minecraft Player Last Login Tracker
description: A Spigot plugin that shows for how long a player wasn't on the server
body:
With this plugin you will be able to track player activity on your Minecraft server and discover how long a player has been absent and when they last logged in.
![Missing list](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc2fe74d0b9956c80bf1fa22d12527b3ebbb7454.png)

# Usage:
/missing list: Gives a list of player and the time since they haven't been on the server.

**NOTE: ONLY PLAYERS WHO HAVE JOINED ATLEAST ONCE AFTER THE PLUGIN WAS ADDED WILL BE ON THE LIST**

/missing remove <Player>: Removes a player from the mission list.

/missing toggle: Toggles the showing of the missing time in the join messages

**NOTE: ONLY OPERATORS CAN USE THE /MISSING REMOVE AND /MISSING TOGGLE COMMANDS**
